name: IT-W3-pii-llm-provider: stop sending the child's real name to LLM providers
description: W3 (PII-handling, solo Item) — send a placeholder/handle for the child's first name to third-party LLM providers; never the real name (F-076, distinct egress surface: the LLM-provider prompt, fix site = exchange prompt construction). Shares the four-unit scrubber discipline.
acceptanceCriteria: No real minor name reaches any third-party LLM provider; break-test on the exchange path; shared scrubber/handle discipline from the canonical home (bundle-level AC across the four W3 PII units). Findings: F-076. Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 IT-W3-pii-llm-provider (commit 23d0c01ad)
riskImpact: XS / standard — third-party sharing of a minor identifier.
